curvature_mass_functional.claim_boundary: Artifact-backed as an author-supplied geometric matching functional. The source itself does not derive this formula from the scalar action, and it is not yet a BHSM neutrino scale theorem.
curvature_mass_functional.source_document_title: Mass from Local Curvature Thresholds in a Scalar Topographic Effective Field Theory
curvature_mass_functional.source_equation: Eq. (2), repeated as Eq. (60); energy form recorded in the legacy EFT corpus

neutral_curvature_mapping.claim_boundary: The neutral kernel supplies a dimensionless positive-threshold response. No artifact maps one response unit to k_neutral,eff in m^-2.
neutral_curvature_mapping.remaining_missing_object: artifact-backed conversion from the dimensionless neutral threshold response to physical curvature in m^-2

propagation_radius.claim_boundary: BHSM names internal/profile radii, but no artifact identifies one as the physical neutral propagation or localization radius. The illustrative 10^-15 m legacy table radius and experimental de Broglie scales are not theorem inputs.
propagation_radius.remaining_missing_object: artifact-backed neutral propagation/localization radius in metres and its coupling to the neutral boundary mode

report_name: BHSM Legacy Curvature-Threshold Neutral Scale Audit

result.claim_boundary: Artifact-backed legacy mass functional plus dimensionless BHSM neutral response only. No eV/GeV mass follows until r_prop and k_neutral,eff have physical units.
result.remaining_missing_object: artifact-backed neutral propagation/localization radius in metres and its coupling to the neutral boundary mode; artifact-backed conversion from the dimensionless neutral threshold response to physical curvature in m^-2
